Chan Buddhism Lineage

Early Chan Patriarchs

  • Bodhidharma (菩提達摩, d. 536?)
    • Dazu Huike (大祖慧可, 487-593)
      • Jianzhi Sengcan (鑑智僧璨, d. 606)
        • Dayi Daoxin (大醫道信, 580-651)

Caodong School

  • Dongshan Liangjie (洞山良价, 807-869)
    • Caoshan Benji (曹山本寂, 840-901)
    • Yunju Daoying (雲居道膺, d. 902)
